Vendored dependency: open-websearch

Version: 2.1.11
Source: https://github.com/Aas-ee/open-websearch
NPM tarball: https://registry.npmjs.org/open-websearch/-/open-websearch-2.1.11.tgz
Integrity: sha512-lyS7SqtMBH5wa51vZOOAhAuS4jDzTDSkxNgAMSzFZbIVUlOpOtHFtGpMOOFN5D8y4aSjvIvcIHPy0tZn5Kz86Q==
License: Apache-2.0

This project vendors the built JavaScript output so the QQ bot can run web search
inside the packaged Node.js executable without starting a separate open-websearch
daemon.
